notes: Bumped after v0.95.1..20276393e sweep (release 0.96.0; v0.95.1 was migration-only, no doc impact, so effectively v0.95.0..HEAD for feature docs). Updated: features/mcp-server.mdx + features/ai.mdx + features/distributor-integrations.mdx (new lookup_distributor_product TD SYNNEX/EC Express AI tool, Tier 2 / ai:write, cost redacted for org-scoped callers #2559); deploy/environment.mdx (new 'Customer Microsoft 365 Graph-read consent (optional)' section — 9 required-when-enabled env vars gated on M365_CUSTOMER_GRAPH_READ_ONBOARDING_ENABLED, dark by default #2495/#2511) + deploy/production.mdx (optional m365-graph-read-executor sidecar image, NOT in bundled compose) + features/identity-integrations.mdx (host-config pointer); features/quotes.mdx (cloning #2535/#2584, change-customer-on-draft, per-table subtotals, customer bill-to 'Prepared for' block, optional send message + click-to-zoom, Pax8-order-on-acceptance cross-link #2549); backup/overview.mdx (per-device 'Run backup now', timezone-correct next-run, breeze-backup helper now bundled by shell-script installs #2558/#2564), backup/restoring.mdx (System image badge, mode+mtime + system-image restore #2581), backup/verification.mdx (integrity now size+SHA-256 vs manifest, real corruption detection #2564); agents/enrollment-keys.mdx (required Site selector on create form #2557). mapping.json: repointed pax8.ts + pax8SyncService.ts integrations.mdx->distributor-integrations.mdx; added pax8Orders.ts, pax8Order*.ts, quoteToPax8Order.ts, aiToolsCatalog.ts, m365ControlPlane/**, m365ControlPlane/runtimeConfig.ts->environment.mdx, m365CustomerGraphRead.ts, m365ConsentCallback.ts, apps/m365-graph-read-executor/**, quotePdf.ts, quoteEmail.ts, quoteService.ts+=quotes.mdx, agent/scripts/install/**. SKIPPED (no admin/integrator doc surface): versioned extension contract #2548 (developer-only @breeze/extension-sdk), Windows helper RDS lifecycle #2520 (internal agent fix), backup execution/result-recording internals #2554/#2556. VERIFICATION NOTES: M365 callback URL derives from PUBLIC_URL (not the .env.example ..._CALLBACK_URL var, which the API ignores but the executor app requires); no m365-graph-read-executor service exists in tracked compose files. CARRIED-OVER GAP STILL OUTSTANDING (unchanged from v0.95.0 sweep — NOT addressed here): v0.94.0 items (portal-user onboarding/invites #2283, partner-policy selectable-org assignment #2280/#2285, ticket-from-AI-conversation #2287, DisplayName->CPE vuln correlation #2290/#2292, internal-OIDC self-host SSO #2295) and earlier v0.93.0 deferrals (per-device Vulnerabilities tab reshape #2272, software single-step Add Package + installer URL vars + EDR readiness #2260, quote image-from-URL #2264, advisory Polish-with-AI #2265, native remote-session consent #2254). MINOR: help-panel route mapping for /backup/profiles page still not added (docsMapping.ts); no new pages created this sweep so no other docsMapping changes needed.
